title: Build and Test an MCP Server with Official SDKs · Protocol Repair Bay
summary: Implement a typed server with tools, resources, and automated protocol tests. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a runnable tested MCP server and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select an official maintained SDK and pin a compatible protocol target.
Create server metadata, capabilities, handlers, and transport entry points.
Validate structured inputs and return typed content or structured errors.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-inspector-debug-13y9rc: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Inspector Debug into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-inspector-debug-13y9rc:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
